questions.questionText: Which AWS service is used for object storage?
What does EC2 stand for in AWS?
Which AWS service provides a managed relational database?
What is Amazon CloudFront?
Which AWS service is a fully managed NoSQL database?
What does IAM stand for in AWS?
Which AWS service provides serverless compute for running code without provisioning servers?
What does VPC stand for in AWS?
Which AWS service is a managed message queue?
Amazon SNS is a publish/subscribe messaging service.
Which AWS service provides managed DNS?
How many pillars does the AWS Well-Architected Framework have?
Which AWS service distributes incoming traffic across multiple targets like EC2 instances?
In the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, who is responsible for patching the guest operating system on EC2 instances?
options: Both AWS and the customer equally

questions.questionText: Which AWS service automatically adjusts compute capacity to maintain steady performance?
AWS regions are made up of multiple isolated locations called what?
Which AWS service lets you run containers without managing servers or clusters?
Amazon S3 stores data as objects in containers called what?
Which service is used to monitor AWS resources and set alarms?
A VPC spans all Availability Zones within a single AWS Region.
What is the maximum execution timeout for an AWS Lambda function?
Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework was added most recently?
What is the maximum message retention period for Amazon SQS?
Which type of Elastic Load Balancer operates at Layer 7 (application layer) and supports path-based routing?
In Amazon DynamoDB, what is the maximum size of a single item?
What does Amazon RDS Multi-AZ deployment provide?
options: Read scalability with multiple read endpoints
Automatic failover to a standby instance in a different Availability Zone
Reduced storage costs through data deduplication
questions.correctAnswer: Automatic failover to a standby instance in a different Availability Zone

questions.questionText: Which Route 53 routing policy sends traffic to the AWS region that provides the lowest latency for the user?
What is the maximum amount of memory you can allocate to a single AWS Lambda function?
Which S3 storage class automatically moves data between access tiers to optimize cost?
In the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, who is responsible for the physical security of data centers?
options: Shared between AWS and the customer

questions.questionText: What is the key difference between a VPC Security Group and a Network ACL (NACL)?
options: Security Groups are stateless; NACLs are stateful
Security Groups operate at the instance level; NACLs operate at the subnet level
Security Groups only support allow rules; NACLs only support deny rules
Security Groups apply to a single AZ; NACLs apply to the entire VPC
questions.correctAnswer: Security Groups operate at the instance level; NACLs operate at the subnet level

questions.questionText: Which AWS disaster recovery strategy has the lowest RTO and RPO but the highest cost?
What type of queue does Amazon SQS FIFO provide compared to standard queues?
options: Exactly-once processing and strict message ordering
questions.correctAnswer: Exactly-once processing and strict message ordering

questions.questionText: Each subnet in a VPC must reside entirely within one Availability Zone.
Which AWS service provides a serverless event bus for routing events between applications using content-based filtering rules?
What is the maximum object size you can upload in a single PUT request to Amazon S3?
Which AWS service lets you orchestrate serverless workflows using a visual state machine?
Which API Gateway type offers the lowest cost and latency but lacks features like usage plans and request validation?
What is the default visibility timeout for a message in Amazon SQS?
What does Amazon CloudFront use to cache content close to end users?
Amazon Aurora replicates data across how many copies in how many Availability Zones?
In AWS KMS envelope encryption, what is encrypted directly by the KMS key?
What is the maximum unzipped deployment package size for an AWS Lambda function, including all layers?
In Amazon Aurora, how many copies of data can be lost without affecting WRITE availability?
Which DynamoDB index type must be created at table creation time and cannot be added later?
In a DynamoDB table with a Local Secondary Index, what is the maximum size of an item collection for a single partition key value?
When you assume an IAM role using AWS STS, what happens to your original IAM user permissions?
options: They are combined with the role's permissions
They are temporarily replaced by the role's permissions
They remain active alongside the role's permissions
questions.correctAnswer: They are temporarily replaced by the role's permissions

questions.questionText: What is the maximum visibility timeout for a message in Amazon SQS?
Which AWS Step Functions workflow type supports executions lasting up to one year with exactly-once execution semantics?
In the SNS-SQS fan-out pattern, what is the role of the SNS topic?
options: It stores messages until consumers process them
It broadcasts each message to all subscribed SQS queues simultaneously
It routes messages based on content filtering to a single queue
questions.correctAnswer: It broadcasts each message to all subscribed SQS queues simultaneously

questions.questionText: What is the maximum number of DynamoDB read capacity units per second that a single partition can deliver?
Which S3 server-side encryption option requires the customer to provide and manage their own encryption keys with each request?
What is the minimum allowed CIDR block size when creating an AWS VPC?
In the 'Pilot Light' disaster recovery strategy, what is running in the DR region during normal operations?
options: Nothing; all resources are created from backups on failover
Only core infrastructure like databases with data replication
A fully scaled-down copy of the production environment
A full duplicate of the production environment at equal scale
questions.correctAnswer: Only core infrastructure like databases with data replication

questions.questionText: What mechanism does Amazon API Gateway use to enforce rate limiting on API requests?
When an SQS FIFO queue has content-based deduplication enabled, how does it generate the deduplication ID?
options: Using a UUID generated by the SQS service

questions.questionText: What is the default account-level throttle limit for Amazon API Gateway per region, across all API types?
In Amazon Aurora's quorum model, how many copies out of six must acknowledge a write for it to be considered committed?
Which Network Load Balancer feature is NOT available on an Application Load Balancer?
options: Static IP addresses per Availability Zone
questions.correctAnswer: Static IP addresses per Availability Zone

questions.questionText: When session policies are passed to an STS AssumeRole call, how are the effective permissions determined?
options: The session policies override the role's identity-based policies
The effective permissions are the union of session policies and role policies
The effective permissions are the intersection of session policies and the role's identity-based policies
Session policies are ignored if the role has an attached permissions boundary
questions.correctAnswer: The effective permissions are the intersection of session policies and the role's identity-based policies
